chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C.P. No.D-344 of 2011. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 01.03.2022. Mr. Habibullah G. Ghouri, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl. A. G. -.-.-.-.-.- The petitioner by way of instant constitutional petition has sought for direction against the respondents to appoint him as Junior Clerk in Education Department, being disable person for the reason that he has applied for such post. Nothing has been brought on record by the petitioner which may suggest that he has actually qualified the requisite test for his appointment as Junior Clerk on disable quota, which may justify this Court to direct the respondents to appoint him as Junior Clerk. Being faced with this situation, it was stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that the petitioner would be satisfied, if subject to law he is permitted to apply for his appointment in civil service on disable quota, whenever the posts are advertised formally, which is not opposed by learned Addl.A.G Sindh. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE
